leadText: Not to be confused with Ice Rock or Ice Stone. The Icy Rock (Japanese: つめたいいわ Icy Rock) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It extends the duration of hail or snow.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If the Pokémon holding this item creates hail with the moves Hail or Max Hailstorm , or the Ability Snow Warning (starting from Generation VI ), it lasts eight turns instead of five turns. In Generation IX , it instead affects a Pokémon creating snow with the moves Snowscape or Chilly Reception , or the Ability Snow Warning, as hail is not present in these games. In the Generation VII games, if hail has its duration extended by the Icy Rock, the turn counter on the user interface for these effects will indicate that it lasts for 8 turns for the player whose Pokémon used the move, while it will display that it lasts for 5 turns for their opponent. After 5 turns of hail have passed, the user interface will display that it lasts for 8 turns for both players. Other uses [ edit | edit source ] In Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire , if held by a nicknamed Regice in the party, along with Regirock and Registeel , allows to spawn Regigigas in Island Cave , except at night or before defeating/catching Groudon OR / Kyogre AS .

B W B2 W2 Route 8 (once per day, at night) DW * Icy Cave X Y Snowbelle City , Frost Cavern OR AS Weather Institute S M US UM Malie City Battle Royal Dome (48 BP ) Sw Sh Hammerlocke Bridge Field ( Digging Duo ) Sw Sh IA Courageous Cavern Cram-o-matic ( Ice : 22–30) Sw Sh CT Hidden recurring item ( Tunnel to the Top ) BD SP Grand Underground S V Delibird Presents ( Cascarrafa Branch, after earning 4 Gym Badges ) Sparkling overworld item ( Glaseado Mountain ) S V ID Sparkling overworld item ( Polar Biome ) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period S M Pokémon Center Alolan Vulpix items Japan February 13 to May 13, 2017

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Icy Rock is a possible ingredient that can be obtained by completing expeditions on Tumblecube Island . As they are blue, Icy Rocks are most commonly found in the areas Backforth Brook , Belly Button Cave , and Hushed Highlands . They can also be obtained randomly by recycling Power Stones .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt A Pokémon hold item that extends the duration of the move Hail used by the holder. HG SS B W B2 W2 A Pokémon held item that extends the duration of the move Hail used by the holder. X Y OR AS An item to be held by a Pokémon. It extends the duration of the move Hail when it's used by the holder. S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. It extends the duration of the move Hail when used by the holder. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder changes the weather to snow, the snow will persist for longer than usual.
